'''vafanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placewoman|placewoman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placewoman|placewoman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vafanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væfængæth|væfængæth]] || [[word:væfængæj|væfængæj]] || [[word:væfængæsh|væfængæsh]] || [[word:væfængæ|væfængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vafafangath|vafafangath]] || [[word:vafafangaj|vafafangaj]] || [[word:vafafangash|vafafangash]] || [[word:vafafanga|vafafanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vafangath|vafangath]] || [[word:vafangaj|vafangaj]] || [[word:vafangash|vafangash]] || [[word:vafanga|vafanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vafafngath|vafafngath]] || [[word:vafafngaj|vafafngaj]] || [[word:vafafngash|vafafngash]] || [[word:vafafngaf|vafafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vafangatha|vafangatha]] || [[word:vafangaja|vafangaja]] || [[word:vafangasha|vafangasha]] || [[word:vafangaka|vafangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vafangath|vafangath]] || [[word:vafangaj|vafangaj]] || [[word:vafangash|vafangash]] || [[word:vafanga|vafanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vafangathal|vafangathal]] || [[word:vafangajal|vafangajal]] || [[word:vafangashal|vafangashal]] || [[word:vafangakal|vafangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vafangathatha|vafangathatha]] || [[word:vafangajaja|vafangajaja]] || [[word:vafangashasha|vafangashasha]] || [[word:vafangaka|vafangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vafangathan|vafangathan]] || [[word:vafangajan|vafangajan]] || [[word:vafangashan|vafangashan]] || [[word:vafangakan|vafangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vafangathaoro|vafangathaoro]] || [[word:vafangajaoro|vafangajaoro]] || [[word:vafangashaoro|vafangashaoro]] || [[word:vafangakaoro|vafangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
